description: Intended to provide a rigorous foundation for stochastic modeling of biological systems. The mathematical emphasis is in stochastic analysis and simulation. Biological applications include epidemiological phenomena, biochemical reaction networks and population dynamics.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (STAT/​MATH  431,309,STAT 311orMATH 531) and (MATH 320,340,341,375,421or531) or graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
